privacyPolicyLink:
Privacy Policy for Era

How We Use Your Information
Personal Information:

We use your email address for account management and to communicate with you about updates or important information.

Usage Data:

We analyze usage patterns to improve our app's content and user experience.

Device Information:

We use device information for technical purposes, such as troubleshooting and ensuring compatibility.

Information Sharing

We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer your personally identifiable information to third parties. We may share aggregated and anonymized data for statistical purposes.

Security

We take reasonable measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access or disclosure. However, no method of transmission over the Internet or electronic storage is completely secure.

Your Choices

You can manage your account settings and preferences within the app. You may opt out of promotional emails at any time by following the unsubscribe instructions in the email.

Changes to This Privacy Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page, and the "Last Updated" date will be revised accordingly.

Contact Us
  1. If you have any questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at [your contact email]. By using Wallki, you agree to the terms outlined in this Privacy Policy.
